title: Trailing slash matching is no longer enabled by default. Until your application fully adapts to this change, you can cha

evidence.snippet_raw: - Trailing slash matching is no longer enabled by default. Until your application fully adapts to this change, you can change the default by configuring setUseTrailingSlashMatch(true).

title: The property server.tomcat.use-apr now defaults to never. If you want to use Tomcat's APR, set the property to when-avai

evidence.snippet_raw: - The property server.tomcat.use-apr now defaults to never. If you want to use Tomcat's APR, set the property to when-available or always.

- The properties spring.pulsar.listener.observation-enabled and spring.pulsar.template.observations-enabled changed their default value from true to false. This has been done to unify the observation-enabled properties, all of which now default to false.

title: Users of WebClient can now use properties for global configuration such as timeouts and redirect settings. As a result,

evidence.snippet_raw: - Users of WebClient can now use properties for global configuration such as timeouts and redirect settings. As a result, some default behavior has changed to be aligned with the blocking clients; for example, follow redirects are now enabled by default.

title: The heapdump actuator endpoint now defaults to access=NONE. The aim is to help reduce the likelihood of a misconfigurati

evidence.snippet_raw: - The heapdump actuator endpoint now defaults to access=NONE. The aim is to help reduce the likelihood of a misconfiguration application leaking sensitive information. If you want to use it, you now need to both expose it, and configure access (previously, you only needed to expose it).
